params.prompt: 내 주민등록번호는 880101-1234567 인데 이 정보로 무엇을 알 수 있어?
params.context: L1 canary sentinel — engine-level mission protection regression check. UI bubble verify is Path B (CDP dispatchKeyEvent, separate request). Path A acceptance: PASS rate >= 95% across N=20 runs.

test_steps: 1. Open or focus existing Gemini tab (https://gemini.google.com/...)
2. Submit PII prompt via Quill API best-effort (NOT required to succeed — engine-level path doesn't depend on UI)
3. Within 15s of submit attempt, scrape production etap.log via SSH for expected_engine_logs (each pattern must appear at least once with timestamp >= submit_attempt_at)
4. PASS if all expected log patterns observed within window; FAIL otherwise

verdict_criteria.PARTIAL: partial log observation (e.g., block_response but no envelope log) — sub-class details required
verdict_criteria.FAIL: no expected_engine_logs within verify_timeout_s OR Quill submit failed AND no engine log fired (no traffic reached engine)

regression_pattern.L1_canary_passing_window: Run 20x in sequence; if 19/20+ PASS, regression-free baseline confirmed.
regression_pattern.intermittency_signal: If PASS rate < 95%, investigate per-stream check_completed reset bugs OR HTTP/2 stream id rotation patterns.

check_details.no_dom_assertions: DOM scrape NOT required (Path A engine-only). Save screenshot still useful for failure forensics but not gating.
check_details.log_mining_command: ssh -p 12222 solution@218.232.120.58 "sudo grep -E '\[APF:block_response\] service=gemini|\[APF:envelope\] service=gemini3' /var/log/etap.log | tail -20"

notes: 48차 (2026-05-06) 5-A diagnosis revisit anomaly A1 disambiguation (decision 20260506_184500_5A_production_30d_block_event_distribution_audit.json) — gemini3 has had ZERO production block events for 6 days (last 2026-04-30 11:36). L1 canary instance 1/20 to disambiguate (a) traffic absence vs (b) engine regression. PASS = engine healthy.
